comments.body: @mtrmac updated. Let's see how the goproxy deals with a retag.

https://travis-ci.org/github/containers/skopeo/jobs/699336876 . (No idea why GitHub isn’t linking to it.)

I suppose we could overwrite `GOPROXY` in `Makefile`, and revert later… ugly. It’s almost tempting to just point the tag back — almost.
Need to cut a v5.5.1 to resolve the GOPROXY issues...
